name: IISc Classic T-Shirt
short_description: 100% combed cotton tee with the Institute crest in gold print.
description: A wardrobe staple for every IIScian. Bio-washed 180 GSM combed cotton with a screen-printed Institute crest that survives a hundred washes. Pre-shrunk, tagless, and cut in a relaxed unisex fit.

specs.Care: Machine wash cold, do not bleach

reviews.comment: Fabric quality is genuinely good. Crest looks sharp even after months.
Runs slightly large, order one size down.

name: IISc Alumni Hoodie
short_description: Heavyweight fleece hoodie in Institute maroon with kangaroo pocket.
description: Built for Bangalore evenings and conference halls alike. 320 GSM cotton-poly fleece, brushed inside, with an embroidered ALUMNI wordmark across the chest, metal-tipped drawstrings and a double-layered hood.

specs.Care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low

reviews.comment: Warm, heavy, and the embroidery is beautiful. Worth every rupee.
Best campus merch I own. Gets compliments at work.

name: Crest Ceramic Mug
short_description: 330 ml ceramic mug with gold crest — dishwasher and microwave safe.
description: The lab-bench companion. A 330 ml glazed ceramic mug in cream with the Institute crest fired in gold-tone ink. Comfortable C-handle, chip-resistant rim, and safe for both microwave and dishwasher.

reviews.comment: My third one — I keep gifting them away.
Good size for filter coffee. Print has held up.

name: Steel Water Bottle
short_description: 750 ml single-wall stainless bottle, laser-etched crest, leak-proof cap.
description: A 750 ml food-grade stainless steel bottle with a laser-etched crest that never peels. Leak-proof screw cap with a carry loop, wide mouth for ice cubes, and a matte maroon powder coat.

specs.Finish: Matte maroon powder coat, laser etch

reviews.comment: Sturdy and genuinely leak-proof. Not insulated though — check the flask if you want that.

name: Padded Laptop Sleeve
short_description: Water-resistant 15.6" sleeve with plush lining and crest zip pull.
description: Protects up to a 15.6-inch laptop with 6 mm foam padding and a scratch-free plush lining. Water-resistant canvas outer in maroon, YKK zip with a crest-stamped pull, and a flat front pocket for chargers.

reviews.comment: Snug fit for my 14-inch ThinkPad with room for the charger.

name: Tata Hall Notebook
short_description: A5 hardbound notebook, 192 ruled pages, lay-flat binding.
description: An A5 hardbound notebook with a debossed line sketch of Tata Hall on the cover. 192 pages of 100 GSM ivory paper that takes fountain pen ink without bleed, thread-sewn lay-flat binding, and a gold ribbon marker.

reviews.comment: Paper quality rivals notebooks three times the price.

name: Campus Backpack
short_description: 25 L water-resistant backpack with padded laptop bay and crest badge.
description: A 25-litre everyday backpack in maroon ripstop with a padded 15.6-inch laptop bay, bottle pockets on both sides, an organiser panel, and a woven crest badge. Breathable back panel and reinforced base.

reviews.comment: Daily commuter for 8 months, zero complaints.

name: Heritage Cap
short_description: Six-panel cotton twill cap with embroidered crest and brass buckle.
description: A six-panel cap in washed cotton twill with the Institute crest embroidered front and centre. Pre-curved brim, breathable eyelets, and an adjustable strap with an antique brass buckle.

reviews.comment: Nice muted maroon shade, not flashy.

name: Executive Pen Set
short_description: Rollerball and ballpoint duo, crest-engraved, in a gift box.
description: A matched rollerball and ballpoint pair in gunmetal with maroon lacquer inlay and a laser-engraved crest on each cap. Ships in a magnetic-close gift box with two spare refills — a favourite for convocation gifting.

reviews.comment: Gifted to my advisor — the box itself feels premium.

name: Alumni Lapel Badge
short_description: Die-struck brass lapel pin with hard enamel crest, butterfly clasp.
description: A 20 mm die-struck brass lapel pin with the Institute crest in hard enamel and a gold-plated rim. Butterfly clasp back, presented on a maroon card — the quiet handshake between alumni everywhere.

reviews.comment: Wore it to a conference in Boston — two strangers walked up to say hello.

name: Insulated Coffee Flask
short_description: 500 ml double-wall vacuum flask — 12 h hot, 24 h cold.
description: A 500 ml double-wall vacuum-insulated flask that keeps filter coffee hot for 12 hours and cold brew cold for 24. Sip-through lid, powder-coated maroon body, and a laser-etched crest.

specs.Insulation: Double-wall vacuum, 12 h hot / 24 h cold

reviews.comment: Coffee is still hot at 4 pm. Magic.

name: Campus Sticker Pack
short_description: Set of 10 vinyl stickers — crest, Tata Hall, banyan tree, and more.
description: Ten die-cut vinyl stickers celebrating campus icons: the crest, Tata Hall, the Main Building arch, the banyan avenue, and a few departmental in-jokes. Waterproof, UV-resistant, laptop-and-bottle safe.

reviews.comment: The banyan one is my favourite. Restock soon please!
